title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.

title: Ask HN: Flag/gray out comments complaining about AI/LLM use in posts/comments?
description:
It's getting tedious. Predictably devolves into "How do you know it's AI/LLM?" & "I know because of these tells..."Reminds me of years past and constant litany of complaints about paywalls. Such comments have for the most part disappeared.
